actorForm.description: Select the users & groups that this policy should apply to.
actorForm.groupsDescription: Search for specific groups that this policy should apply to, or select All Groups to apply it to all groups.
actorForm.ownersDescription: Whether this policy should be apply to owners of the Metadata asset. If true, those who are marked as owners of a Metadata Asset, either directly or indirectly via a Group, will have the selected privileges.
actorForm.ownershipTypesDescription: List of types of ownership which will be used to match owners. If empty, the policies will applied to any type of ownership.
actorForm.title: Applies to
actorForm.usersDescription: Search for specific users or service accounts that this policy should apply to, or select All Users to apply it to all users.
column.name: Name
deletePolicyText: Are you sure you want to remove this policy?
exitEditorText: Are you sure you want to exit policy editor? All changes will be lost
glossarySelectorDescription: The policy will apply to resources with the chosen glossary terms or any term under the chosen glossary term groups. If <bold>none</bold> are selected, the policy will not account for glossary terms.
glossarySelectorPlaceholder: Select glossary terms or term groups to apply to specific resources.
loadError: Failed to load policies! An unexpected error occurred.
pageSubTitle: View your DataHub permissions. Take administrative actions.
privilegeForm.containerPlaceholder: Apply to ALL containers by default. Select containers to apply to specific containers.
privilegeForm.containersDescription: The policy will apply to resources only in the chosen containers. If <bold>none</bold> are selected, the policy is applied to resources in <bold>all</bold> containers.
privilegeForm.domainPlaceholder: Apply to ALL domains by default. Select domains to apply to specific domains.
privilegeForm.domainsDescription: The policy will apply to any chosen domains and all their nested domains. If <bold>none</bold> are selected, the policy is applied to <bold>all</bold> resources of in all domains.
privilegeForm.privilegesDescription: Select a set of privileges to permit.
privilegeForm.resourceDescription: Search for specific resources the policy should apply to. If <bold>none</bold> is selected, policy is applied to <bold>all</bold> resources of the given type.
privilegeForm.resourcePlaceholder: Apply to ALL resources by default. Select specific resources to apply to.
privilegeForm.resourceTypeDescription: Select the types of resources this policy should apply to. If <bold>none</bold> is selected, policy is applied to <bold>all</bold> types of resources.
privilegeForm.resourceTypePlaceholder: Apply to ALL resource types by default. Select types to apply to specific types of entities.
privilegeForm.tagsDescription: The policy will apply to all entities containing all of the chosen tags. If no tags are selected, the policy will not account for tags.
roles.assignError:
Failed to assign Role to users: 
 {{error}}
roles.loadError: Failed to load roles! An unexpected error occurred.
systemPolicyTooltip: This is a system policy and cannot be modified
typeForm.descriptionDescription: An optional description for your new policy.
typeForm.metadataDescription: The <bold>Metadata</bold> policy type allows you to assign metadata privileges to users. These include the ability to manipulate metadata like ownership, tags, documentation associated with Datasets, Charts, Dashboards, & more.
typeForm.nameDescription: A name for your new policy.
typeForm.platformDescription: The <bold>Platform</bold> policy type allows you to assign top-level DataHub Platform privileges to users. These include managing users and groups, creating policies, viewing analytics dashboards and more.
typeForm.typeDescription: The type of policy you would like to create.
updateError: Failed to update policies. An unexpected error occurred.
